name: nometria
description: Deploy, manage, and monitor apps from any AI coding tool. 20 MCP tools for production deployments, instance management, GitHub sync, env vars, custom domains, and AI security scans.

tools.name: nometria_login
tools.description: Save your Nometria API key or get sign-in instructions

tools.name: nometria_deploy
tools.description: Deploy the current project to production

tools.name: nometria_preview
tools.description: Create a free 2-hour staging preview

tools.name: nometria_status
tools.description: Check deployment status of an app

tools.name: nometria_logs
tools.description: View deployment logs for an app

tools.name: nometria_list_apps
tools.description: List all your deployed apps

tools.name: nometria_init
tools.description: Initialize nometria.json config in the project

tools.name: nometria_github_connect
tools.description: Connect GitHub for auto-deploy on push

tools.name: nometria_github_status
tools.description: Check if GitHub is connected for an app

tools.name: nometria_github_repos
tools.description: List GitHub repos connected to your account

tools.name: nometria_github_push
tools.description: Push local changes to connected GitHub repo

tools.name: nometria_start
tools.description: Start a stopped instance

tools.name: nometria_stop
tools.description: Stop a running instance

tools.name: nometria_terminate
tools.description: Permanently terminate an instance

tools.name: nometria_upgrade
tools.description: Resize instance (2gb/4gb/8gb/16gb)

tools.name: nometria_domain_add
tools.description: Add a custom domain to your app

tools.name: nometria_env_set
tools.description: Set environment variables on your app

tools.name: nometria_env_list
tools.description: List environment variable keys for your app

tools.name: nometria_scan
tools.description: Run AI security and performance scan

tools.name: nometria_setup
tools.description: Generate AI tool config files for all IDEs

tools.name: nometria_rollback
tools.description: Roll back to a previous deployment version
